response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience requirement with roughly 15 years of software development, including recent full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React work at Optilyz and re:cinq, direct AI-agent and MCP tooling experience, and strong testing craftsmanship (TDD, author of test frameworks). Cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, MongoDB/SQL, and Java exposure round out the required skills. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience, and a current career gap since October 2025 that should be explored in an interview.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience with recent TypeScript, Node.js, and React product work
Hands-on AI-agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling
Deep testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, ran testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
No Kotlin and limited recent Java, listed among required languages
Current career gap since October 2025 warrants clarification
